title: pleopeltis michauxiana
intro: Pleopeltis michauxiana, also known as the resurrection fern, is a type of epiphytic fern native to the southeastern United States. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation and its antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Pleopeltis michauxiana include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve respiratory health, and provide antioxidant protection. In herbal preparations, the plant is often made into a tea or tincture, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
